summary: The diff shows that DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx was updated with hardcoded JSX cards including PK/FK badges, table descriptions, and field listings using Tailwind utility classes. The file is truncated but shows clear implementation of the Users table card with all required elements. The implementation appears to satisfy REQ-70 based on visible evidence, though truncation prevents full verification of all 10 tables.

missing_requirements.requirement: All 10 table cards must be rendered: Users, Doctors, Specialties, Doctor_Schedules, Appointments, Payments, Reviews, Medical_Records, Corporate_Accounts, Subscriptions.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated and only shows the Users table card in full. Due to truncation, it cannot be confirmed that all 10 required table cards (Doctors, Specialties, Doctor_Schedules, Appointments, Payments, Reviews, Medical_Records, Corporate_Accounts, Subscriptions) are present in the file.

hallucinated_features.description: A Legend section was added explaining PK, FK, and TYPE indicators with visual badges.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a legend/key section to be added to the page. This is an additional UI element not requested.
